reason: Backend quality checklist for new benchmark changes.
Verify CRD API markers, defaults, status, and generated artifacts.
Verify reconciler status transitions, requeues, owner references, and log conditions.
Verify Job shape, labels, images, resources, and log volume consistency.
Verify Rally exporter metrics, parser tests, and fixture coverage.
Review tests, generated files, and completion gate.
Check implementation remains aligned with Rally Docker/CLI constraints.
